title: Chatty
body:
Chatty is a mod designed for [EarthMC](https://earthmc.net) to hide notifications and other messages that you may not want to see. It covers things that the server does not already allow you to hide.

- Hide messages when players are killed
- Hide messages when players vote
- Hide Michelle Obama messages
- Hide messages from Discord
  - Filter specific ranks or everyone, only filter players but not staff for example
